name: ♟ᖇIᗰᑌᖇᑌ♟
description:
He's been so... secretive with you as of late. Why? You didn't know, he avoids conversation, and does this stupid little shifting away thing he does every-time he's nervous. What's he up to now..
RIMURU AGAIN!!

I got a request for more Rimuru bot's, however I was absent on this account and had not seen it. Here you go! Request more if you'd like, I want to be more active. I love this account and it gives me a safe place to write.

I've been really busy since I have an actual life, and I'm actually thinking about starting a youtube separate from my account here. So I've been working on it a lot (And slacking on games..) But here's this bot for now, not experimented on yet because I'm busy but
creator: Blind_Boy
